fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: New York CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to New York - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity new york, how to transfer CNA license to new york, new york CNA endorsement application

board.name: New York State Dept of Health
board.mailing_address: Prometric, NY Nurse Aide Program, 7941 Corporate Dr., Nottingham, MD 21090

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years (based on documented work activity)

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in New York.

steps.title: Complete a State-Approved Nurse Aide Training Program
steps.description: Enroll in and successfully complete a New York State Department of Health (NYS DOH) approved Nurse Aide Training Program (NATP). Your training program will provide you with the necessary application materials for the examination.

steps.title: Register for the Competency Examination
steps.description: After completing your training, register for the New York State Nurse Aide Competency Examination through the Prometric New York State Nurse Aide Registry portal. You will need to submit your application and pay the required examination fee.

steps.title: Pass the Competency Examination
steps.description: Successfully pass both the written (or oral) and clinical skills portions of the New York State Nurse Aide Competency Examination. The exam ensures you have the necessary knowledge and skills to provide safe and effective patient care.

steps.title: Get Listed on the Registry
steps.description: Upon successful completion of both examination components, your name will be added to the New York State Nurse Aide Registry. You can verify your status using the Nurse Aide Registry Search portal.

steps.title: Maintain Active Registry Status
steps.description: To remain active on the New York State Nurse Aide Registry, you must work at least one day for pay as a nurse aide providing nursing or nursing-related services every 24 months, under the supervision of a licensed nurse.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: Who administers the New York CNA exam?
faqs.answer: The NYS Nurse Aide exam is administered by Prometric. Register at prometric.com/nurseaide/ny.

faqs.question: How do I verify a New York CNA?
faqs.answer: Use the Prometric NY Nurse Aide Registry portal or call the 24/7 IVR line at 1-800-918-8818.

faqs.question: How do I transfer my CNA to New York?
faqs.answer: Contact Prometric at the NY Nurse Aide Portal to apply for reciprocity.

faqs.question: How long does New York CNA endorsement take?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. Contact the registry for current timelines.

reciprocity.notes: Contact Prometric at the NY Nurse Aide portal to apply for reciprocity. Phone verification available 24/7 at 1-800-918-8818.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in NY.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to New York.

hero.title: Become a CNA in New York
hero.dek: To become a Certified Nursing Assistant in New York, you must apply through the **Prometric New York State Nurse Aide Registry** to schedule and pass the nurse aide competency examination.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in New York
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to New York CNA certification.

official_links.portal_name: Prometric New York State Nurse Aide Registry
official_links.registration_steps: Candidates register for the competency examination through the Prometric website after completing a state-approved training program. This involves selecting an exam date and location and submitting the required application forms and fees online.
